title: Type definition for TypeScript incorrectly augments "this"
author: Burtsev-Alexey
body:
Cleans up other projects augmentations as discussed in Vue official doc: 

https://vuejs.org/guide/typescript/options-api.html#augmenting-custom-options

Breaks other projects, see:
https://github.com/primefaces/primevue/issues/6624

This should be declare module ''vue' according to Vue doc (see first link)
https://github.com/imcvampire/vue-axios/blob/990cacb197c3943c236725b82ebb8a94ac11dce2/index.d.ts#L5

title: 'AxiosInstance' is not assignable to parameter of type 'AxiosStatic'
author: 1e4
body:
I have `http.js` configuring axios however when importing it it fails with 

```
src/main.ts(16,19): error TS2769: No overload matches this call.
-- | --
Overload 1 of 2, '(plugin: Plugin<[axios: AxiosStatic]>, axios: AxiosStatic): App<Element>', gave the following error.
Argument of type 'AxiosInstance' is not assignable to parameter of type 'AxiosStatic'.
Type 'AxiosInstance' is missing the following properties from type 'AxiosStatic': create, Cancel, CancelToken, Axios, and 12 more.
Overload 2 of 2, '(plugin: Plugin<[axios: AxiosStatic]>, options: [axios: AxiosStatic]): App<Element>', gave the following error.
Argument of type 'AxiosInstance' is not assignable to parameter of type '[axios: AxiosStatic]'.
src/main.ts(16,19): error TS2769: No overload matches this call.
Overload 1 of 2, '(plugin: Plugin<[axios: AxiosStatic]>, axios: AxiosStatic): App<Element>', gave the following error.
Argument of type 'AxiosInstance' is not assignable to parameter of type 'AxiosStatic'.
Type 'AxiosInstance' is missing the following properties from type 'AxiosStatic': create, Cancel, CancelToken, Axios, and 12 more.
Overload 2 of 2, '(plugin: Plugin<[axios: AxiosStatic]>, options: [axios: AxiosStatic]): App<Element>', gave the following error.
Argument of type 'AxiosInstance' is not assignable to parameter of type '[axios: AxiosStatic]'.
ERROR: "type-check" exited with 2.
```

http.js
```js
import axios from 'axios'

const http = axios.create({
  baseURL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL
});

export default http;
```

main.js
```js
import './assets/main.css'

import { createApp } from 'vue'
import { createPinia } from 'pinia'

import App from './App.vue'
import router from './router'

import http from './http'
import VueAxios from 'vue-axios'

const app = createApp(App)

app.use(createPinia())
app.use(router)
app.use(VueAxios, http)

app.mount('#app')

```

This works fine with javascript and only fails with TypeScript. I'm sure it's something simple to fix. I checked the tickets and saw there may be issues with types and such as there doesn't seem to be full TS support.

Does anyone have a solution for this?

title: Axios to 1.0.0 update problem
author: Savuelo
body:
The recent package update to 3.5.0 caused a problem in my copier (https://copier.readthedocs.io/en/stable/) managed projects. 
I cannot update the project because of the dependency error. Copier tries to install the historic dependencies to track the changes but it fails due to version missmatch. I have declared that I require vue axios in version `vue-axios@"^3.4.1"`, and also an axios `axios@0.27.2`. This configuration was fine until `vue-axios` package wasn't updated to `3.5.0` with dependency for `axios >=1.0.0`. Now I can't perform update process.
I cannot update historic copier-template release to fix the dependencies. 


I would ask you to release a new version of this package with the previous version of axios, and add 1.0.0 support as a new major.

```
npm ERR! code ERESOLVE
npm ERR! ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree
npm ERR! 
npm ERR! Found: axios@0.27.2
npm ERR! node_modules/axios
npm ERR!   axios@"^0.27.2" from the root project
npm ERR! 
npm ERR! Could not resolve dependency:
npm ERR! peer axios@">=1.0.0" from vue-axios@3.5.1
npm ERR! node_modules/vue-axios
npm ERR!   vue-axios@"^3.4.1" from the root project
```

title: Uncaught Error: ES Modules may not assign module.exports or exports.*, Use ESM export syntax
author: shilik
body:
After upgrading to the latest version of vue-axios, I got the following error message.

`***** Fatal JavaScript exception - application has been terminated. *****
NativeScript encountered a fatal error: Uncaught Error: ES Modules may not assign module.exports or exports.*, Use ESM export syntax, instead: ./node_modules/vue-axios/dist/vue-axios.esm.min.js
at
set(file: app/webpack:/douyou/webpack/runtime/harmony module decorator:7:0
at ./node_modules/vue-axios/dist/vue-axios.esm.min.js(file: app/webpack:/douyou/node_modules/vue-axios/dist/vue-axios.esm.min.js:1:688
at __webpack_require__(file: app/webpack:/douyou/webpack/bootstrap:19:0
at ./app/main.js(file:///app/bundle.js:28:68)
at __webpack_require__(file: app/webpack:/douyou/webpack/bootstrap:19:0
at __webpack_exec__(file:///app/bundle.js:12601:39)
at (file:///app/bundle.js:12602:221)
at __webpack_require__.X(file: app/webpack:/douyou/webpack/runtime/startup entrypoint:6:0
at (file:///app/bundle.js:12602:47)
at (file:///app/bundle.js:12607:3)
at require(:1:137)`

Any suggestions for the above errors? Thanks.

title: Unable to import package when running `yarn dev` with v3.3.4
author: maddie
body:
When running `yarn dev` with v3.3.4, error occurs:

```
yarn run v1.22.11
warning package.json: No license field
$ vite
 > src/main.ts:3:21: error: [plugin: vite:dep-scan] Failed to resolve entry for package "vue-axios". The package may have incorrect main/module/exports specified in its package.json: Failed to resolve entry for package "vue-axios". The package may have incorrect main/module/exports specified in its package.json.
    3 │ import VueAxios from "vue-axios";
      ╵                      ~~~~~~~~~~~

error when starting dev server:
Error: Build failed with 1 error:
src/main.ts:3:21: error: [plugin: vite:dep-scan] Failed to resolve entry for package "vue-axios". The package may have incorrect main/module/exports specified in its package.json: Failed to resolve entry for package "vue-axios". The package may have incorrect main/module/exports specified in its package.json.
    at failureErrorWithLog (ui/node_modules/esbuild/lib/main.js:1451:15)
    at ui/node_modules/esbuild/lib/main.js:1131:28
    at runOnEndCallbacks (ui/node_modules/esbuild/lib/main.js:921:63)
    at buildResponseToResult (ui/node_modules/esbuild/lib/main.js:1129:7)
    at ui/node_modules/esbuild/lib/main.js:1238:14
    at ui/node_modules/esbuild/lib/main.js:609:9
    at handleIncomingPacket (ui/node_modules/esbuild/lib/main.js:706:9)
    at Socket.readFromStdout (ui/node_modules/esbuild/lib/main.js:576:7)
    at Socket.emit (node:events:394:28)
    at Socket.emit (node:domain:475:12)
error Command failed with exit code 1.
info Visit https://yarnpkg.com/en/docs/cli/run for documentation about this command.
```

Upon inspection, the `package.json` in `node_modules/vue-axios` defines `dist/vue-axios.esm.min.js` as main, whereas only `dist/vue-axios.common.min.js` is available in the package.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/221872/132474117-9bc4f3f5-3518-48cb-aecf-9b6265f75790.png)

title: Upgrade from v3.2.5 to v3.3.4 results in "Module not found error" on Vue2
author: Theofilos-Chamalis
body:
After upgrading vue-axios from v3.2.5 to v3.3.4, running my Vue2 project on dev mode produces the following error:

```
ERROR in ./src/main.js 9:0-32
Module not found: Error: Can't resolve 'vue-axios' in '/Users/theofiloschamalis/Projects/EVOPTT/web-app/src'
resolve 'vue-axios' in '/Users/theofiloschamalis/Projects/EVOPTT/web-app/src'

Parsed request is a module
  using description file: /Users/theofiloschamalis/Projects/EVOPTT/web-app/package.json (relative path: ./src)
    
Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
resolve as module
/Users/theofiloschamalis/Projects/EVOPTT/web-app/src/node_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory
looking for modules in /Users/theofiloschamalis/Projects/EVOPTT/web-app/node_modules
single file module
using description file: /Users/theofiloschamalis/Projects/EVOPTT/web-app/package.json (relative path: ./node_modules/vue-axios) no extension
          
Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
/Users/theofiloschamalis/Projects/EVOPTT/web-app/node_modules/vue-axios is not a file
*
Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
/Users/theofiloschamalis/Projects/EVOPTT/web-app/node_modules/vue-axios* doesn't exist
.js
Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
/Users/theofiloschamalis/Projects/EVOPTT/web-app/node_modules/vue-axios.js doesn't exist
.vue
```

My main.js file contains the following to register vue-axios:

```
import Vue from 'vue';
import Vuetify from 'vuetify';
import axios from 'axios'
import VueAxios from 'vue-axios'

import App from './App';
import router from './router';

// Import the script to register a service worker in production
import './registerServiceWorker';

Vue.use(Vuetify);
Vue.use(VueAxios, axios);
```

I'd like also to mention that axios is on v0.21.4

Hope this helps.
